calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiffs Individual Claims With Prejudice, And Class Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MARTIN AREVALO's Motion To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiff's Individual Claims With Prejudice, And Class Claims Without Prejudice.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Motion granted. The motion is unopposed and movant's declaration complies with CRC 3.770.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-23-2022 Continued To Feb-22-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
